message:
fix(provenance): fail-closed cached trust window boundary in validate_links

Changed `<=` to `<` in validate_links cached trust window checks to match
the fail-closed semantics already used in validate_attestation_freshness.
At the exact boundary, the window should be considered expired (fail-closed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -591,11 +591,11 @@ fn validate_links(
         if stale_by_age || stale_by_expiry {
             let within_cached_window = matches!(policy.mode, VerificationMode::CachedTrustWindow)
                 && age
-                    <= policy
+                    < policy
                         .max_attestation_age_secs
                         .saturating_add(policy.cached_trust_window_secs)
                 && now_epoch
-                    <= link
+                    < link
                         .expires_at_epoch
                         .saturating_add(policy.cached_trust_window_secs);
